case_title: MCDANIEL, ALMA G. VS HYATT, LILLIAN

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HYATT, LILLIAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MCDANIEL, ALMA G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,012.50 FILED BY MCDANIEL, ALMA G. AS TO DEFENDANT HYATT, LILLIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDANIEL, ALMA G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HYATT, LILLIAN $2,012.50 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,032.50, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HYATT, LILLIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MCDANIEL, ALMA G. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HYATT, LILLIAN
